name: Butterscotch Brittle
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, corn syrup, water, and salt in a 3-quart saucepan.
2. Slowly bring to a boil, stirring constantly until the sugar completely dissolves.
3. Continue boiling frequently to prevent burning.
4. Boil to 285 degrees (soft-crack stage).
5. Add butter and continue cooking, stirring constantly until the temperature reaches 295 degrees (hard-crack stage).
6. Remove from heat; let set for about a minute until bubbling stops.
7. Pour into a well-buttered 13x9-inch pan.
8. Cool, then break into pieces.
Makes about 1-1/2 pounds.
